top.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran
top.summary: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, according to US media.

top.title: Large-scale Russian attack on Ukraine leaves four dead and dozens injured
top.summary: The Oreshnik missile, which reportedly travels over 10 times the speed of sound, was used, Russia has confirmed.

top.title: Turkish riot police storm opposition offices after leaders ousted
top.summary: Officers forced their way into the building days after the party vowed to defy a court ruling removing its leaders.

top.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
top.summary: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

top.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
top.summary: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

top.title: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
top.summary: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.

title.#text: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
Apple’s latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
